title: Bayesian Inference Path
description: Build fluency in Bayesian Inference inside Statistical Methods by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Variational Inference
steps.summary: A method for approximating complex probability distributions using simpler distributions. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Bayesian Inference. Start after Model Inference. It opens into Variational Inference Techniques and Variational Inference Enhancements.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: OODA Loop (Observe-Orient-Decide-Act)
steps.summary: OODA Loop (Observe-Orient-Decide-Act) belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Bayesian Inference. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Bayesian Inference. Start after ACT-R and ACT-R Architecture. It opens into OODA Loop (Observe-Orient-Decide-Act) in AI.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Configuration Model
steps.summary: Configuration Model belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Bayesian Inference. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Bayesian Inference. Compare it with Winsorization and Upsampling. It opens into YAML for Model Configuration and YAML Configuration Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Search-Based Inference
steps.summary: Search-Based Inference belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Bayesian Inference. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Bayesian Inference. Start after Model Inference and A* Search.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Monte Carlo Tree Search LLM
steps.summary: Monte Carlo Tree Search LLM belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Bayesian Inference. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Bayesian Inference. Start after Monte Carlo and Monte Carlo Tree Search.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: SignSGD / PowerSign / AddSign
steps.summary: SignSGD / PowerSign / AddSign belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Bayesian Inference. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Bayesian Inference. Start after SignSGD and AddSign.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Probabilistic Graphical Models
steps.summary: Probabilistic Graphical Models belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Bayesian Inference. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Bayesian Inference. Compare it with Probabilistic Graphical Models Extensions and Probabilistic Graphical Models Enhancements. It opens into Probabilistic Graphical Models (PGMs) and Probabilistic Graphical Cognitive Models.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Probabilistic Graphical Cognitive Models
steps.summary: Probabilistic Graphical Cognitive Models belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Bayesian Inference. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Bayesian Inference. Start after Probabilistic Graphical Models and Cognitive Architecture.
